name: Comparison
summary: Utility class with methods for comparing two with each other

methods.name: AllPointsAreOneAxis
methods.summary: Check if all points of polyline are on one straight line
methods.remarks: Check if all points of polyline are on one straight line

methods.name: Congruent
methods.signature: Congruent(l1p1: Point2D, l1p2: Point2D, l2p1: Point2D, l2p2: Point2D) -> bool | Congruent(l1: Line2D, l2: Line2D) -> bool
methods.summary: compare 2D points of two 2D lines if are congruent
methods.remarks: compare 2D points of two 2D lines if are congruent

returns.doc: true if lines are congruent, otherwise false.

methods.name: DeterminePosition
methods.signature: DeterminePosition( geoObject: object, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( line: Line2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( axis: Axis2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( polyline: Polyline2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( arc: Arc2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( arc: Arc3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( clothoid: Clothoid2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( spline: Spline2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( polygon: Polygon2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition(polygon: Polygon2D, line: Line2D) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( line: Line3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( polyline: Polyline3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition(phed: Polyhedron3D, point: Point3D) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( spline: Spline3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( spline: BSpline3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( path: Path3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( b: BRep3D, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( polygon1: Polygon2D, polygon2: Polygon2D ) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition(line: Line2D, minMax: MinMax2D) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition(lines: Line2DList, minMax: MinMax2D) -> eComparisionResult | DeterminePosition( igeo: object, point: Point3D, tolerance: float ) -> eComparisionResult
methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to an object.
methods.remarks: Determine the relative position of a point to an object.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

returns.doc: eOnElement(between start and end points), eEqualToStartPoint, eEqualToEndPoint, eLeft, eRight, eAbove, eBelow

methods.name: DeterminePositionEx
methods.signature: DeterminePositionEx( polyline: Polyline2D, point: Point2D, tolerance: float ) -> tuple[eComparisionResult, VecSizeTList]
methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to a 2D polyline.
methods.remarks: Determine the relative position of a point to a 2D polyline.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

returns.doc: tuple(eOnElement(between start and end points), eEqualToStartPoint, eEqualToEndPoint, eLeft, eRight, eAbove, eBelow, number of the segment of polyline in which was the point found (-1 - is not on polyline, 0 - first segm., ...))

methods.name: HitsElement
methods.summary: Check if comparison result hits element in some way

returns.doc: true, if the result indicates that the element is hit, otherwise false e.g. left, right, etc.
